title: skill search/news: coverage-based ranking + skill news command
desc: skill search ranks by SkillCoverageScore (sum of tok.Length/field.Length per match). skill news shows recently updated skills; accepts optional query for coverage-ranked filtering. Shared SkillCoverageScore() helper also used by PrintSkillHintOnError.
steps:
wkappbot skill search <keyword>  -- returns all matches ranked by coverage score (cov=X.XX shown per result)
wkappbot skill news [query] [--days N]  -- lists skills updated in last N days (default 7). With query: coverage-ranked. Without: sorted by LastActivity.
Coverage score = sum over all (token, field) pairs where field.Contains(token): tok.Length / field.Length. Fields: id, title, desc, best-matching tag. Higher = token covers larger fraction of matched field.
PrintSkillHintOnError (on non-zero exit) also uses SkillCoverageScore() -- same ranking for error-time skill hints (threshold >= 0.3).
author: claude
